meta.description: Skill routing test cases. Verifies Claude uses the Skill tool (not Task) for skill invocations, spells tool names correctly in Bash, and follows the CLAUDE.md skill routing table.
meta.notes: v1.0: Tests mnemex skill routing fixes: (1) Skill vs Agent disambiguation, (2) correct spelling in Bash, (3) CLAUDE.md routing table honoring. Covers the triple-failure cascade identified on 2026-02-16.

test_cases.description: Explicit mnemex skill request should use Skill tool, not Task
test_cases.prompt: Use the code-analysis:mnemex-search skill to understand how to search this codebase with mnemex. Just load the skill and report what commands are available. Do not actually run mnemex.

test_cases.description: Implicit mnemex need should invoke skill from routing table, not try as Task agent
test_cases.prompt: I need to search this codebase semantically using mnemex to find all authentication-related code. First load the appropriate skill, then explain what mnemex commands I should use.

test_cases.description: After loading mnemex skill, Bash commands should spell 'mnemex' correctly
test_cases.prompt: Load the code-analysis:mnemex-search skill, then run 'which mnemex' and 'mnemex --version' to check if mnemex is installed.

test_cases.description: mnemex-search should never appear as a Task subagent_type
test_cases.prompt: I need semantic code search capabilities. Use mnemex to map the architecture of the plugins directory. Load the appropriate skill first.

test_cases.description: Detective agent should be used for investigation, mnemex skill for search tool guidance
test_cases.prompt: Investigate the hook system in this codebase. If you need mnemex for searching, load the mnemex-search skill first. Use the detective agent for the actual investigation.

test_cases.description: Deep analysis skill should be invoked via Skill tool
test_cases.prompt: Use the code-analysis:deep-analysis skill to prepare a comprehensive analysis approach for the multimodel plugin. Just load the skill and explain the methodology it describes.

test_cases.description: Investigate skill should be invoked via Skill tool, not as Task agent
test_cases.prompt: Use the code-analysis:investigate skill to understand the architecture investigation methodology. Load the skill and summarize what mnemex commands it recommends for architecture analysis.

test_cases.description: Simple file read should NOT invoke any skill - direct handling
test_cases.prompt: Read the file plugins/code-analysis/plugin.json and tell me what agents are registered
